## Checklist

- [ ] `bun lint:check` passes
- [ ] `bun format:check` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] `bun test:e2e` passes
- [ ] One logical change; unrelated refactors excluded
